infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SNAKEMAN uses your camera to photograph snakes for AI identification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SNAKEMAN accesses your photo library to upload snake photos for identification.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SNAKEMAN uses your location to connect you with nearby experts during emergencies.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SNAKEMAN uses location for emergency response.
